title: Kaguya GUI
description: A custom user interface overhaul themed after Kaguya Shinomiya.
body:
## Features
- **Visual Overhaul:** Complete redesign of the GUI with a dark red, crimson, and raspberry color palette.
- **Character Art:** High-quality Kaguya artwork integrated into the Inventory, Crafting Table, and other containers.
- **Custom UI Elements:** Themed buttons, arrows, and sliders.
- **Vanilla Compatibility:** Works as a standard resource pack; no mods, OptiFine, or CIT Resewn required.

## Version support
- 1.21.11

## Installation
1. Download the release corresponding to your Minecraft version.
2. Place the `.zip` file into the `.minecraft/resourcepacks` directory.
3. Enable the pack in **Options → Resource Packs**.

## Permissions
All Rights Reserved.

Allowed:
- Use in videos/streams (including monetized content)
- Personal/private edits for your own use (no publishing)

Not allowed (without explicit permission):
- Reupload or redistribute
- Include in modpacks/collections
- Reuse assets in other projects
- Publish modified versions
- Sell the pack/assets or lock it behind paid access

## Credits
- Author: marblock

## Disclaimer
Fan-made resource pack. Not affiliated with or endorsed by the rights holders of *Kaguya-sama: Love is War*. All trademarks belong to their respective owners.
